title: SQS (Simple Queue Service) Semantics
description: Master the semantics of SQS, distinguishing between Standard and FIFO queues. Architect resilient processing systems by managing SQS visibility timeouts and message group IDs for ordered message delivery.
objectives: Master the semantics of SQS, distinguishing between Standard and FIFO queues.
Architect resilient processing systems by managing SQS visibility timeouts and message group IDs for ordered message delivery.
